transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: Hi Jon. Thanks for making time. I want to understand what your team needs before we talk options.

transcript.speaker: Jon
transcript.text: We have twelve people handling onboarding by hand. The work keeps piling up.

transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: Your CRM shows the team added four implementation managers this quarter. Is the manual work still the main constraint?

transcript.speaker: Jon
transcript.text: Yes, but the Growth plan is almost twice what we budgeted. I cannot take that price to finance.

transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: I hear you. Give me a moment to connect the price to what the team is losing today.

transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: The comparison is not the plan against a smaller tool. It is the plan against twelve people spending eleven hours a week on repeated setup.

transcript.speaker: Jon
transcript.text: That helps, but finance will want proof that another team saw the result.

transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: Harbor Health had the same approval concern. Their operations lead used the rollout brief to show where the hours would come back.

transcript.speaker: Jon
transcript.text: Send me that brief. If the math holds, I can bring this to our Friday review.

transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: I will send the Harbor Health brief today, with the assumptions highlighted. Can we hold twenty minutes on Thursday to check the numbers together?

suggestions.title: Account detail
suggestions.content: Northstar Labs added 4 implementation managers this quarter. Manual onboarding is still marked as the main risk.
suggestions.reason: The customer described onboarding work. The CRM record had the matching account note.
suggestions.useEvidence: Maya cited the new implementation managers at 00:15.

suggestions.title: Price to current cost
suggestions.content: Reframe the choice around 12 people spending 11 hours each week on repeated setup.
suggestions.reason: The customer said the Growth plan was over budget and hard to take to finance.
suggestions.useEvidence: Maya used the cost comparison at 00:42.

suggestions.title: Harbor Health proof
suggestions.content: Use the Harbor Health finance approval brief. It shows the rollout assumptions and recovered team time.
suggestions.reason: The customer asked for proof that another team could defend the result to finance.
suggestions.useEvidence: Maya brought up the Harbor Health approval brief at 00:59.

suggestions.title: Book the finance check
suggestions.content: Send the brief today. Offer a 20 minute review before the Friday finance meeting.
suggestions.reason: The customer agreed to review the proof before the Friday meeting.
suggestions.useEvidence: Maya offered the brief and Thursday review at 01:16.
